content:
I, Priya Mehta, Junior Clerk in the Property Tax Division of Bhopal Municipal Corporation, solemnly declare the following:

I have worked under Mr. Rajiv Sharma since 2019. I noticed a pattern: whenever landowners paid cash to get illegal regularization of encroached plots, their files were approved immediately. I saw Mr. Sharma receive cash envelopes from a man named Vikram Singh on multiple occasions. One such incident occurred on 15th March 2022 at around 11:10 AM, near the municipal office parking lot. Vikram arrived in a black Maruti Swift, handed him an envelope, and left. I was at the window of the records room and saw it clearly.

I also saw similar transactions in May and July 2022. After the June 2022 purchase of a plot in Indore under Mrs. Sharma’s name, I became afraid. I have no personal grudge against Mr. Sharma, but I could not remain silent. I submitted an anonymous complaint to ACB because I feared retaliation. I did not see any other source of income for Mr. Sharma. His father passed away in 2020, and I know for a fact that he left no property or savings. I have no idea how the ₹2.1 crore plot was paid for.

I swear this statement is true to the best of my knowledge.
